# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kafka topic authorization.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Broker Identity
broker.id=1
broker.rack=rack1

# Network and Security Configuration
listeners=SASL_SSL://0.0.0.0:9093,SSL://0.0.0.0:9094
advertised.listeners=SASL_SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093,SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9094
listener.security.protocol.map=SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL,SSL:SSL
inter.broker.listener.name=SASL_SSL

# SSL Configuration
ssl.keystore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=
ssl.key.password=
ssl.truststore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=
ssl.client.auth=required
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.cipher.suites=TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https

# SASL Configuration
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512
security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL

# Authorization and ACLs
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer
super.users=User:admin;User:kafka-broker
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Zookeeper Connection (Secure)
zookeeper.connect=zk1.example.com:2181,zk2.example.com:2181,zk3.example.com:2181/kafka
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000
zookeeper.set.acl=true

# Log Directories
log.dirs=/var/kafka/data-1,/var/kafka/data-2,/var/kafka/data-3
log.retention.hours=168
log.retention.bytes=1073741824
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000
log.cleaner.enable=true
log.cleanup.policy=delete

# Replication Settings
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
unclean.leader.election.enable=false
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10

# Topic Configuration
num.partitions=3
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

# Network and Thread Configuration
num.network.threads=8
num.io.threads=16
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600
queued.max.requests=500

# Producer and Consumer Settings
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576
message.max.bytes=1048576
max.request.size=1048576
compression.type=snappy

# Group Coordinator Settings
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000
group.max.session.timeout.ms=300000
group.min.session.timeout.ms=6000

# Controller Settings
controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

# Metrics and Monitoring
metric.reporters=
metrics.num.samples=2
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000

# Connection Limits
max.connections.per.ip=100
max.connections.per.ip.overrides=

# Request Handling
request.timeout.ms=30000
connections.max.idle.ms=600000

# Quota Configuration
quota.producer.default=10485760
quota.consumer.default=10485760

# Log Flush Settings
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000
log.flush.scheduler.interval.ms=3000

# Replica Settings
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000
replica.socket.receive.buffer.bytes=65536
replica.fetch.min.bytes=1
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500
num.replica.fetchers=4

# Delete Topic Configuration
delete.topic.enable=true

# Background Thread Configuration
background.threads=10
log.cleaner.threads=2
log.cleaner.io.max.bytes.per.second=1048576
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.size=134217728

# Offset Management
offsets.retention.minutes=10080
offsets.commit.timeout.ms=5000
offsets.commit.required.acks=-1

# Transaction Settings
transaction.max.timeout.ms=900000
transactional.id.expiration.ms=604800000

# Password Encryption
password.encoder.secret=
password.encoder.cipher.algorithm=AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding
password.encoder.key.length=128
password.encoder.iterations=4096

# Additional Security
delegation.token.master.key=
delegation.token.max.lifetime.ms=604800000
delegation.token.expiry.time.ms=86400000
